description.en: Update the hmac object with msg. Repeated calls are equivalent to a single call with the concatenation of all the arguments: m.update(a); m.update(b) is equivalent to m.update(a + b). Changed in version 3.4: Parameter msg can be of any type supported by hashlib.

excerpt.es: Update the hmac object with msg. Repeated calls are equivalent to a single call with the concatenation of all the arguments: m.update(a); m.update(b) is equivalent to m.update(a + b). Changed in versi...
